evals.prompt: Enforce test policy on a new Python function that calculates fibonacci
evals.expected_output: Tests are created covering unit tests, edge cases (negative input, zero), and error paths
assertions: Unit tests cover the function's core logic
Edge case tests include boundary values (0, 1, negative input)
Test coverage target of 80% is enforced

evals.prompt: Review existing test coverage in a TypeScript project with Express.js
evals.expected_output: Assessment of current coverage and recommendations for improvement
assertions: Language (TypeScript) and framework (Express.js) are correctly identified
Coverage assessment considers unit, edge case, and error path tests
CI configuration is evaluated for coverage enforcement
